creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
I've tried to contact paxvel to no vail. I was waiting
for a protocolar 1 month timeout before complaining about
his unresponsiveness. Who knows, it could have been
justified; which seems to have been the case.
 
        Sobomax also contacted him and got the following
response (I quote):
 
---
 MS> What do maintainer think about it?
i'll be out of business for a couple of years. consider getting a new
maintainer. sorry.
 
.paxvel
 ccie #5957
---
 
        Sobomax and I have been exchanging some email regarding
these PRs. I am waiting for his resolution on this issue.
        I've shown interest on taking over maintainership of both
ports if this turns out as an option.
 
        Regards,
                Mario Ferreira
